{{Quote|Hmm... I guess I am happy...now that the Navy has arrived.|[[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]]|<ref name="Jedi Council: Acts of War 4">[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 4|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 4]]</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Uhanayih''' concluded the [[Yinchorri Uprising]] of [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]].

==Background==
Having survived a [[Battle of Yinchorr (Yinchorri Uprising)|vicious battle]] on the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] homeworld of [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]], the surviving [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] located the hidden Yinchorri high command on the lifeless planet [[Uhanayih]]. Knowing that their mission had to be accomplished despite having lost friends, the Jedi traveled to Uhanayih on their last remaining [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]]. Meanwhile on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] managed to persuade the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] to send four [[Republic Navy/Legends|Navy]] attack groups to deal with the Yinchorr and to place a blockade the [[Yinchorri system]] though he had to make several promises to them.

==The battle==
[[File:Battle_of_Uhanayih2.jpg|thumb|left|The [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] arrives.]]

Eventually, the Jedi arrived at Uhanayih. However, they were met by a massive Yinchorri fleet and soon under attack. Luckily for the Jedi, help came in the form of a Republic Navy fleet consisting of [[Republic light assault cruiser]]s and armed [[CSS-1 Corellian Star Shuttle/Legends|Corellian Star Shuttle]]s. Soon, much of the Yinchorri fleet had been destroyed or immobilized, allowing the Jedi to make their way to Uhanayih.

[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] then ordered [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] to contact the [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] in charge of the Republic forces and request for an escort for their trip to the Yinchorri high command. Thus, the Jedi cruiser approached the moon with the escort and entered a huge tunnel which led to the Yinchorri base.

Having arrived and seeing no place to land, the Jedi cruiser crash-landed into the high command's war room before the defending Yinchorri could close its blast shutters. Meanwhile, in the war room, one of the Yinchorri remarked to his companion that the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] had assured that the Republic would not intervene. His friend then replied that Vilmarh and his men had fled and then ordered the blast shutters to be shut. However, it was too late.

The cruiser wrecked the war room, causing heavy damage to the Yinchorri. The commander would then beg the victorious Jedi not to kill them. Mace Windu then replied by remarking that those Yinchorri were responsible for the chaos and then asked Adi Gallia about what [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]] said about the philosophy of "might makes right". Gallia replied by telling him that that philosophy is "often recanted" upon encountering a more powerful foe.

==Aftermath==
[[File:BattleofUhanayih3.jpg|thumb|250px|The [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] surrender.]]

Following the Yinchorri surrender, a quarantine was placed on the Yinchorri system and a heavy Republic presence was installed. This would affect the system and the Yinchorri species in the years to come.
